metadata.name: Handle Free Trial to Paid Subscription Conversion

description: A user's free trial is about to end, and the system needs to automatically convert them to a paid subscription.

nodes.task_description: Identify all users whose free trials are ending today.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of users to be converted.

nodes.task_description: For each user, charge their registered payment method for the first month of service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the payments. Some succeed, some fail.

nodes.task_description: Update the account status to 'Active Subscriber' for successful payments, and 'On Hold' for failed payments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly updates the status for all users in the list.
